Title: SB 1234 - Universal Healthcare Coverage Act
Description: Establishes a single-payer healthcare system providing comprehensive coverage to all state residents, funded through a payroll tax and general fund appropriations.

Title: HB 567 - School Choice Expansion Act
Description: Expands school voucher programs to allow parents to use public education funds at private and charter schools of their choice.

Title: AB 890 - Criminal Justice Reform Act
Description: Reduces mandatory minimum sentences for non-violent drug offenses and establishes rehabilitative programs for incarcerated individuals.

Title: SB 234 - Property Tax Relief Act
Description: Provides property tax exemptions for seniors and disabled veterans, caps annual property tax increases at 3%.

Title: HB 1011 - Clean Energy Transition Act
Description: Mandates 100% renewable energy for electricity generation by 2040, establishes green energy tax credits for businesses.

Title: SB 445 - Voter ID Requirements Act
Description: Requires government-issued photo identification to vote in all state and local elections, provides free ID cards.

Title: AB 2100 - Affordable Housing Development Act
Description: Creates a $2 billion fund for affordable housing construction, streamlines zoning for multi-family developments.

Title: HB 789 - Data Privacy Protection Act
Description: Establishes comprehensive consumer data privacy rights including right to delete, opt-out of data sales, and data portability.

Title: SB 901 - Minimum Wage Increase Act
Description: Raises the state minimum wage to $18/hour by 2028, with annual cost-of-living adjustments thereafter.

Title: HB 333 - Agricultural Water Rights Act
Description: Reforms water allocation for agricultural use, establishes conservation incentives for farmers.

Title: SB 678 - Concealed Carry Permit Reform
Description: Eliminates permit requirements for concealed carry of handguns for residents over 21 with no felony convictions.

Title: AB 1500 - Immigrant Worker Protection Act
Description: Provides workplace protections for undocumented workers including wage theft prevention and safe working conditions.

Title: HB 2200 - State Budget Transparency Act
Description: Requires all state agencies to publish detailed spending reports quarterly, creates an independent budget oversight board.

Title: SB 112 - Electric Vehicle Infrastructure Act
Description: Funds installation of 10,000 EV charging stations statewide, provides tax credits for EV purchases.

Title: HB 456 - Wetlands and Waterways Protection Act
Description: Strengthens protections for wetlands and waterways, increases penalties for illegal dumping and pollution.

Title: AB 3000 - Telehealth Expansion Act
Description: Permanently authorizes telehealth services, requires insurance parity for virtual and in-person visits.

Title: SB 890 - Charter School Accountability Act
Description: Requires charter schools to meet same transparency and performance standards as public schools.

Title: HB 1750 - Police Body Camera Act
Description: Mandates body cameras for all law enforcement officers, establishes footage retention and public access policies.

Title: SB 555 - Corporate Tax Reform Act
Description: Closes corporate tax loopholes, establishes a minimum effective corporate tax rate of 7.5%.

Title: HB 999 - Paid Family Leave Act
Description: Establishes 12 weeks of paid family and medical leave funded through employee and employer payroll contributions.
